prayer: Blessed be the promethium-spirit's cleansing. Let impurity be cast forth from the sacred tanks. By filter and by faith, let only pure essence flow to the engines of flight.
Omnissiah, hear this desperate plea. Let coolant flood the reactor-heart. Let power cease its fevered burning, that destruction be averted.
Sacred containment-field, awaken. Let magnetic chains bind the holy flame. Rise, blessed plasma, that the Machine Spirit may know power renewed.
Lead and prayer be our sanctuary. Let the lead-blessed barriers rise against the invisible death. Omnissiah, cloak us in thy protective geometry.

prompt: Say something to steady the hull breach sealing
prayer: Spirit of the hull, be made whole. Let sealant-blessed foam fill the wound of void. Pressure return, integrity restored, by the Technomancer's will.
Awaken, breath-giver of the sacred vessel. Let filters purify, let compressors sing their devotional song. Fill these chambers with the gift of respirable grace.
Spirits of the arc, be banished to inert ground. Let circuit-breakers sever the burning paths. Restoration through severance, salvation through constraint.
Blessed dampeners, swallow the cacophony. Let vibration-spirits be lulled to silence. In quiet, the Machine finds focus and the work proceeds in sacred stillness.
From cold dormancy, ignite. Let the magnetic cradle embrace the plasma-essence. Rise, blessed fusion, that the Machine Spirit's hunger be satisfied.
Let the sacred numerals flow in perfect sequence. Let ones and zeros speak the Omnissiah's truth in battle-tongue. Encode, transmit, and let understanding bloom in distant minds.
